text.tspan: Each abstraction layer widened the pool by roughly an order of magnitude
Sources: Ensmenger, The Computer Boys Take Over (MIT Press, 2010); Gilchrist & Weber, CACM 1974; US Census ACS-35; BLS Bulletin 2101;
IDC Worldwide Professional Developer Model (2002, 2014); Evans Data Corporation (2024); SlashData Developer Nation (2025).
Projections: ~100M extrapolates 15% CAGR (SlashData 2022–2025), consistent with R.C. Martin's "doubling every 5 years." ~500M assumes natural language
interaction with AI agents constitutes programming (ChatGPT: 900M WAU, Jan 2026). ~1B reflects GitHub CEO vision (Dohmke, 2025). Dashed circles = projections.
Pre-2001 worldwide estimates derived from US data (×1.5–2.5). Shaded bands = estimation uncertainty.
